_readme.purpose: Example topic registry for the context-lookup plugin. Copy to <workspace>/topics.json and edit.

schema.categories.<id>.name: Display label shown in list_topics output.
schema.categories.<id>.order: Optional integer for sort order (lower = first).
schema.topics.<name>.file: Required. Path relative to workspace root, or absolute.
schema.topics.<name>.section: Optional. Default heading substring to slice (case-insensitive).
schema.topics.<name>.description: Optional but recommended. Shown when an agent calls list_topics.
schema.topics.<name>.aliases: Optional. Extra names that resolve to this topic.
schema.topics.<name>.category: Optional. Category id to group under in list_topics output.

notes: Edit freely — the plugin reads at startup. Restart the host (e.g. OpenClaw gateway) after changes.
Topic naming: prefer kebab-case nouns (e.g. 'git-conventions', 'deployment-runbook'). Keep names short.
The _readme key is ignored by the plugin.

git-conventions.description: Branch naming, commit message format, PR review checklist

security-baseline.description: Secret handling, dependency audit policy, threat-modelling triggers

code-review-checklist.description: Standard items to check on every pull request (the Checklist section of code-review.md)

deployment-runbook.description: Standard deploy procedure: pre-flight, rollout stages, rollback triggers

incident-response.description: On-call playbook: triage steps, severity ladder, comms templates

database-conventions.description: Schema migration rules, index policy, backup/restore procedures

testing-conventions.description: Test pyramid expectations, naming, fixture handling
